description: Catalog of Context Workbench blueprints. Each new workspace copies BLUEPRINTS/_shared, then applies overlay folders in order.

default.label: Default
default.description: _shared base plus default generic system prompt; used when you omit the blueprint on create.

presales.label: Pre-sales / solution architect
presales.description: _shared base plus pre-sales technical architect system prompt.

technical-architect.label: Technical architect (delivery)
technical-architect.description: _shared base plus technical-architect system prompt; extend REFERENCES for your standards.

enterprise-sales.label: Enterprise sales (B2B)
enterprise-sales.description: _shared base plus enterprise-sales system prompt for discovery, deal strategy, and buyer-ready narratives.

demand-generation.label: Demand generation (marketing)
demand-generation.description: _shared base plus demand-generation system prompt for campaigns, ICP, and measurable GTM work.

strategic-leadership.label: Strategic leadership
strategic-leadership.description: _shared base plus strategic-leadership system prompt for priorities, OKRs, and executive communication.

product-marketing.label: Product marketing (PMM)
product-marketing.description: _shared base plus product-marketing system prompt for positioning, launches, and sales enablement.

software-development.label: Software development
software-development.description: _shared base plus software-development system prompt for implementation, tests, and code-focused work.
